learningGoal: User opens their AI Synthesis, navigates the sections, and extracts one actionable insight.
keyPoints: Open your Free Energy Blueprint and scroll to the AI Synthesis section below your body graph
The Synthesis has five sections: Energy Type, Strategy, Authority, Defined Centers, and Your Gates — read them in order
The Defined Centers section tells you where you have consistent, reliable energy — these are your strengths
The Gates section shows your specific traits, gifts, and potential challenges based on your natal chart
Find one sentence in the Synthesis that feels immediately true and write it down — that is your starting anchor
toneNotes: Calm, precise, and guiding. The viewer is looking at something dense for the first time. Help them not feel overwhelmed. One step at a time.
